case_title: THE TIDES CENTER VS. CHARLES PRESLEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRESLEY, CHARLES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 149 6TH STREET, #218, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
